# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.

Load secrets from environment variables or a secret manager rather than embedding them in code.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php namespace App\Services; 
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;   // Import Config Facade for accessing config files directly without using 'config()' function inside classes or methods, e.g., use \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config instead of require('path/to/config').
class SMSNotificationService { 
    protected $account_sid;   // Declare a variable to hold the account sid from config file (Twilio credentials) and make it private so we can access via getter method.
    
    protected $auth_token ;//Declaring variables for auth token, same as above but also making them private 
     
       public function __construct() {   // Constructor to initialize the account sid & Auth Token from config file and make it accessible in class methods via getter method.    
           $this->account_sid = Config::get('twilio.' . env('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID')); 
            $this->auth_token  = Config::get('twilio.' . env('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN') );   // Accessing the environment variables using 'env()' function.   
       }    
        public function sendMessage($to, $from = "Twilio",  $body) {  /* Function to handle sending SMS */     
            \Twilio\Rest\Client::init($this->account_sid , $this->auth_token); // Initialize TwiML client with account sid and auth token.  
            $message = new \Twilio\Rest\Api\v2010\Account\Message();  /* Create a message instance */   
             ->$message     # Set the body of our SMS (the text version) to be sent in this call, e.g., "Hello world!"   // Send an SMS with Twilio's REST API and store it into '$sentMessage'. 
            );      /* End message instance */    }     return $message;       }}` ;?>
